text: MarketReel — Global Film DistributionInside OutMarketing Campaign Strategy BriefMarketReel Intelligence Document 2015 Global Release StrategyStrategic OverviewTitleInside OutRelease StrategyWide theatrical; prestige awards positioning; education sector partnershipsRecommended WindowJune (summer family; US school year end)OTT StrategyDisney day-and-date or short exclusive window; educational platform licensing (Netflix Education, Apple Education) secondaryEstimated Marketing Spend90M USD (all territories)Target Audience SegmentsFamilies with children 6-14Parents interested in emotional intelligenceAdults (Pixar brand)Mental health professionals / educatorsCore Marketing HooksThe following narrative hooks have been identified as the film's primary marketing levers:What if your emotions had a life of their own?Pixar's most personal filmJoy. Sadness. And everything in between.The film that will make adults cry as much as childrenTerritory Marketing Spend & StrategyTerritoryBudget (USD)Strategy NotesNorth America35MPixar brand; mental health educator outreach; awards campaignChina18MFamily digital campaign; emotional education angle; parenting mediaJapan12MEmotional interiority resonance; manga/anime press cross-promoUK8MSchool partnerships; family theatrical; BAFTA considerationBrazil5MPortuguese dub; family digital; emotional themes marketingIndia4MMental health awareness tie-in; urban parenting pressGermany4MChildren's film festival; educational partnershipsRest of World4MDigital-led; subtitled versions priorityRelease Window RationaleRecommended theatrical release window: June (summer family; US school year end)This window has been selected based on competitive landscape analysis, historical box office performance for this genre in target territories, award season positioning requirements, and OTT platform licensing timeline needs.Digital & OTT StrategyDisney day-and-date or short exclusive window; educational platform licensing (Netflix Education, Apple Education) secondaryDigital marketing investment should be weighted toward territories with high mobile-first media consumption (India, Southeast Asia, Latin America, Africa). Social media platform prioritization: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube for 18-34; Facebook, YouTube for 35; WeChat, Weibo, Douyin for China-region.PR & Talent StrategyPrincipal cast: Amy Poehler, Phyllis Smith, Bill Hader, Mindy Kaling, Lewis Black, Kaitlyn DiasPress tour sequencing recommendation: Begin with home-market press junket (North America/UK), followed by sequential territory visits prioritized by theatrical revenue projection. Virtual press events are recommended for long-tail territory coverage. Influencer partnerships should be activated 4 weeks prior to theatrical release date in each territory.Awards Campaign NotesIf this title is positioned for awards consideration, the following additional investments are recommended: screener distribution to eligible voters (Academy, BAFTA, HFPA), FYC advertising in trade publications (Variety, Hollywood Reporter, Screen International), and targeted awards-season theatrical runs in qualifying markets (Los Angeles, New York, London minimum).MarketReel Confidential — Inside Out Marketing Strategy — For Internal Distribution Use Only
